title: xanthisma arenarium
intro: Xanthisma arenarium, also known as yellow betony, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Xanthisma arenarium are typically infused in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
